name: 02_semantic_duplicates
description: KNOWN BLIND SPOT: Paraphrased chunks with exact same meaning but different words. Jaccard fails here.

input.system: You are a financial advisor bot.

messages.content: How much did the startup raise?

chunks.content: The burgeoning tech startup successfully secured $1.5 million in early stage seed funding from venture capitalists.
A sum of 1.5M dollars was raised by the new tech company during their initial seed round backed by VC firms.
